m7e_twse_trading_calendar_authority.trading_day_label_rule: Name containing exact substring 交易日 is explicit trading-day label

m7f_rich_fact_browser_operator_workbench.browser_e2e_screenshot_caveat: Browser/Playwright tooling was not available in the execution environment; static DOM/security/unit regression coverage was used instead.

known_caveats: Windows default-ci requires PYTHONUTF8=1 or explicit UTF-8 file reads.
FastAPI root returns JSON status; frontend is opened as frontend/public/index.html.
Manual UI acceptance directly covered 2330 TWSE route; 8069 TPEx/OTC route was live-smoke validated through controlled API/package execution.
